title: roulinia cordata
side_effects: Roulinia cordata can have side effects if used improperly, such as allergic reactions, gastrointestinal problems, and skin irritation. Overconsumption of the plant's extract can cause headaches, dizziness, and nausea, while prolonged use may lead to kidney damage or liver toxicity. In severe cases, improper use of Roulinia cordata can also cause respiratory issues, including asthma-like symptoms and shortness of breath. It is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using Roulinia cordata for medicinal purposes to avoid these potential side effects.
